title: Dreaming of a Chasing CRYING: Meaning & Interpretation
seoDescription: Discover what dreaming of a chasing crying means. In-depth Jungian analysis of chasing crying dreams and their psychological significance.
introduction: When a crying appears in your dreams colored by the quality of "chasing", its message becomes more specific and urgent. The combination reveals a powerful message from your unconscious mind.
symbolism:
The chasing quality adds the dimension of pursuit of goals or running from fears to the core symbolism of crying, which represents cathartic healing.

This combination suggests your psyche is processing something with both the archetypal energy of the crying AND the emotional charge of "chasing". Pay attention to how this made you feel in the dream.
cosmicAnalysis: Chasing CRYING dreams are particularly potent during certain moon phases. A Full Moon amplifies the emotional intensity, while a New Moon suggests this symbol is emerging from deep within your unconscious for the first time.
commonScenarios: A chasing crying approaching you - confrontation with this energy is imminent
Multiple chasing cryings - the message is being repeated for emphasis
Transforming into a chasing crying - you are integrating this archetype
Running from a chasing crying - avoidance of this aspect of yourself
cta: Every dream symbol carries personal meaning. Track your chasing crying dreams over time to uncover deeper patterns.
